summary: Resolved Bug #1 (startup crash caused by port collision on host and duplicate environment variables forcing psycopg2) and Bug #2 (pagination stability via unique secondary sorting keys).
evidence: Created infra/docker-compose.yml and started Postgres and Redis. Solved port conflict on 5432 by removing stale containers.
Modified nest-api/.env to point to correct database upsk_sdf and ran schema push successfully.
Corrected nest-api/src/links/links.service.ts to stabilize pagination sorting with secondary id sorting in orderBy.
Verified that health check returns ok and pagination endpoints successfully list non-overlapping links.
